text.title: Local LLM Ollama Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to wire a production Ollama integration.

step.name: install
step.action: curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh; systemctl enable ollama.

step.name: pick-model
step.action: 7B for ≤8GB, 13B for 16GB, 70B for 48GB. Run a 30-item gold eval against cloud baseline before locking.
step.decision-gate: If gold-eval gap > X pp → abort, route to cloud.

step.name: pre-pull-model
step.action: ollama pull <model> as part of deploy / systemd ExecStartPre. Verify disk file present before service starts.

step.name: wire-health-check
step.action: GET /api/tags on http://localhost:11434 at startup. On failure raise "Ollama not running. Start with: systemctl start ollama".

step.name: wire-openai-client
step.action: OpenAI(base_url="http://localhost:11434/v1", api_key="ollama"). Use the same call pattern as cloud; swap is config-only.

step.name: swap-test
step.action: Run the test suite against cloud + local; diff outputs on the gold eval. Promote to prod only if both paths green.
step.decision-gate: If local fails on a class of inputs → route that class to cloud only.
